import React, { useRef, useState } from "react"; import "../App.css"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import emailjs from "@emailjs/browser"; const Contact = () => { const form = useRef(); const sendEmail = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); emailjs .sendForm( "service_sefxqu6", "template_y0iw7sn", form.current, "1b7EUpTatSsPE5a7O" ) .then( (result) => { console.log(result.text); }, (error) => { console.log(error.text); } ); }; return (
{renderAlert()}
